title: DoIT Hybrid Conference Rooms
body: Beyond the vendor costs, there is a $750 charge for managing project planning and installation. This includes documentation, end user training, and 30 days of DoIT support. If ongoing DoIT support is requested, there is an annual fee of $725. Ongoing support includes equipment maintenance, phone and onsite support, and additional training and documentation as needed. Support does not include staffing for meetings or events, hardware replacement costs, or costs associated with services from FP&M or outside vendors. To request a new hybrid conference room or upgrades to an existing room, see the Custom Audiovisual Conference Room service Page. Conference Room Options Room Sizes Small Room Capacity: 1-6 people Display: Up to 65" LED screen Video Conferencing Zoom, Webex, and MS Teams calling Integrated camera, microphones, and speakers Wired and wireless screen sharing Cost: Starting at $3,000 - $5,000 Medium Room Capacity: 6-12 people Display: Up to 80" LED screen Video Conferencing Zoom, Webex, and MS Teams calling Integrated camera, microphones, and speakers Additional table microphone Wired and wireless screen sharing Cost: Starting at $5,000 - $8,000 Large Room Capacity: Over 12 people Display: Up to 98" LED screen or projection system Video Conferencing Zoom, Webex, and MS Teams calling Integrated camera, microphones, and speakers Additional table or ceiling-mounted microphones and speakers Wired and wireless screen sharing Cost determined by room and system requirements Conference Room Hardware Configurations Equipment Options Room Type Display Conferencing Device Cameras Audio Control Small/Medium Room LED TV Cisco Room Bar 4K camera integrated with Room Bar Microphones and speakers are integrated with Room Bar Optional Cisco table or ceiling mounted microphone Webex Navigator touch panel Used to join Webex, Zoom, and Teams meetings Controls camera, audio, and wired/wireless content sharing Can integrate with room calendar Medium/Large Room LED TV Cisco Webex Room Bar Pro 4K camera integrated with Room Bar Pro Microphones and speakers are integrated with Room Bar Pro Optional Cisco table or ceiling mounted microphone Webex Navigator touch panel Used to join Webex, Zoom, and Teams meetings Controls camera, audio, and wired/wireless content sharing Can integrate with room calendar Large Room LED TV or Projector Cisco Webex Room Kit EQ 4K Quad Camera standard with Room Kit EQ Optional wall or ceiling-mounted camera Speakers are integrated with Quad Camera Cisco table or ceiling-mounted microphones or third party ceiling-mounted audio system Webex Navigator touch panel Used to join Webex, Zoom, and Teams meetings Controls camera, audio, and wired/wireless content sharing Can integrate with room calendar
